title: fragaria glauca
intro: Fragaria glauca, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Fragaria glauca include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Fragaria glauca can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
